message:
fix(postgres): return Ok after successful SCRAM authentication

The SASL/SCRAM-SHA-256 authentication branch was missing a
return Ok(()) after authenticate_scram() succeeded, causing
execution to fall through into the else branch that returns
UnsupportedAuth. This meant SCRAM auth always appeared to fail
even when the handshake completed successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
